title: Wathe Compat
description: A resource pack that gives sprite animations to (most) of the items  in The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express modpack.
body:
# Wathe Compat
_Wathe Compat_ is a resource pack that adds compatibality between the _Eating Animation_ mod and _The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express_ modpack. _Wathe Compat_ does so by adding sprite animations for drinking to all of the drinks added in _The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express_ modpack. Next to that, Wathe Compat now also adds sprite animations to (most) of the items added in the modpack.

<details>
<summary>Items with eating animations</summary>

Champagne,
Cosmopolitan,
Martini,
Mojito,
Old Fashioned

</details>


<details>
<summary>Items with sprite animations</summary>

Crowbar,
Firecracker,
Grenade,
Key,
Knife,
Poison Vial,
Revolver

</details>

In order for this resource pack to work the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod must be installed into the [The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express) modpack.

_*Shaders used in showcase are not included and must be installed seperately._
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HRrz9ztrf9w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OBRrFP-_CoI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Credits

Credits for the method used to implement the sprite animations found in the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod go to [@theoness1](https://modrinth.com/user/theoness1) and [@PinkGoosik](https://modrinth.com/user/PinkGoosik)

Credits for the original textures used in making the sprite animations found in [The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express) modpack go to [@doctor4t](https://modrinth.com/user/RAT).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jOjo3WRIMe8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### More features may be added to Wathe Compat in the future!
